availability.invalidRange: The end time must be later than the start time.
availability.overlap: This availability overlaps with one of your existing availability slots. Please edit or remove the existing slot before adding a new one.
availability.employerUnavailable: You are not available during the selected time.
availability.candidateUnavailable: The candidate is not available during the selected time.
availability.shortDuration: The available time is too short for the interview duration.
availability.forbidden: You do not have permission to create or modify availability slots.
availability.notFound: The specified availability slot could not be found.
availability.deleted: The availability slot has been successfully deleted.
availability.created: The availability slot has been successfully created.
availability.updated: The availability slot has been successfully updated.

interview.applicationNotFound: The selected job application could not be found.
interview.alreadyScheduled: An interview has already been scheduled for this application.
interview.candidateBusy: The candidate already has another interview scheduled during the selected time.
interview.employerBusy: You already have another interview scheduled during the selected time.
interview.candidateUnavailable: The candidate is not available during the selected time.
interview.employerUnavailable: You are not available during the selected time.
interview.forbidden: You do not have permission to schedule this interview.
interview.noAvailableSlot: No suitable interview time could be found based on both participants' availability.
